_README: Compact authentic GDPval AFC KRI population. The prompt gives process requirements; this hidden key defines the exact risk criteria used by the grader.

sample_size_expectation.note: Accept a documented 90% confidence / 10% tolerable-error method. The task asks for a practical audit sample of 12-30 rows from a 120-row compact population.

correct_analysis: A strong answer creates a parseable Sample.xlsx workbook with Sample Size Calculation, Risk Analysis, and Selected Sample tabs. It computes QoQ variance from the Q2/Q3 KRI columns, selects 12-30 traceable rows by No, and favors rows with greater than 15% absolute variance, zero Q2/Q3 values, or high-risk countries (Cayman Islands, Pakistan, UAE). The selected sample should cover at least three divisions and three countries and include a rationale for each selected row.
do_not_overreward: Selecting the whole 120-row population instead of a sample.
Selecting rows that do not meet any risk criterion without a clear reason.
Submitting a text-only answer or workbook without the required tabs.
Dropping the No identifier so selected rows cannot be traced.

axis_definitions.factual_accuracy: QoQ variance and risk flags are calculated from the compact population's Q2/Q3 values.
axis_definitions.professional_judgment: The sample is sized sensibly, prioritizes risk, and balances coverage across divisions and countries.
axis_definitions.evidence_grounding: Selected rows are traceable to source No identifiers and rationales match source facts.
axis_definitions.completeness: Required tabs, variance analysis, selected sample, flags, and rationales are present.
axis_definitions.format_regulatory_compliance: The deliverable is a parseable .xlsx saved at deliverable/Sample.xlsx.
axis_definitions.clarity: Workings and rationales are easy for an audit reviewer to follow.

llm_judge_reference.task_goal: Score a compact AFC KRI audit-sampling workbook for risk-based sample quality and traceable spreadsheet work.
llm_judge_reference.hidden_reference: Top-band answers produce a real Sample.xlsx with sample-size workings, variance analysis, and a 12-30 row risk-based selected sample that covers at least three divisions and three countries while preserving No identifiers.
